tab

Version 1.0
Status In Development

Intro heading

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
Content
Content
  <section
    id="tag-123"
    class="
      qld__body
        qld__body--light
    "
  >
    <div class="container-fluid">

        <div class="row">

          <div class="qld__tab-intro col-xs-12 col-md-6"
          >

              <h2>
                Intro heading
              </h2>
            
              Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

          </div>
        </div>

      <div
        id="tab-123"
        class="
          qld__tab-container
            qld__tab-container--light
          qld__tab-container__fixed
        "
      >
        <button
          class="qld__tab-nav__item-scroll tab-overflow-nav-button-left"
          aria-hidden="true"
          aria-label="Scroll tab buttons left"
          tabindex="-1"
        >
          <svg
            class="qld__icon qld__icon--sm"
            aria-hidden="true"
            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          >
            <use
              href="/mysource_files/img/QLD-icons.svg#chevron-left"
            ></use>
          </svg>
        </button>
        <button
          class="qld__tab-nav__item-scroll tab-overflow-nav-button-right"
          aria-hidden="true"
          aria-label="Scroll tab buttons right"
          tabindex="-1"
        >
          <svg
            class="qld__icon qld__icon--sm"
            aria-hidden="true"
            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
          >
            <use
              href="/mysource_files/img/QLD-icons.svg#chevron-right"
            ></use>
          </svg>
        </button>
        <div class="qld__tabs" role="tablist">
              <button
                id="tab1-123-button"
                class="qld__tab-button active"
                role="tab"
                data-tab="tab1-123"
                aria-selected="true"
                aria-controls="tab1-123-content"
                tabindex="0"
              >
                <span>
                    <svg
                      class="qld__icon qld__icon--sm"
                      aria-hidden="true"
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                    >
                      <use
                        href="/mysource_files/img/QLD-icons.svg#extended_blood"
                      ></use>
                    </svg>
                  Title
                </span>
              </button>
                <button
                  id="tab2-123-button"
                  class="qld__tab-button"
                  role="tab"
                  data-tab="tab2-123"
                  aria-selected="false"
                  aria-controls="tab2-123-content"
                  tabindex="-1"
                >
                  <span>
                      <svg
                        class="qld__icon qld__icon--sm"
                        aria-hidden="true"
                        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      >
                        <use
                          href="/mysource_files/img/QLD-icons.svg#extended_patient_file"
                        ></use>
                      </svg>
                    Title
                  </span>
                </button>
                <button
                  id="tab3-123-button"
                  class="qld__tab-button"
                  role="tab"
                  data-tab="tab3-123"
                  aria-selected="false"
                  aria-controls="tab3-123-content"
                  tabindex="-1"
                >
                  <span>
                      <svg
                        class="qld__icon qld__icon--sm"
                        aria-hidden="true"
                        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      >
                        <use
                          href="/mysource_files/img/QLD-icons.svg#extended_bone"
                        ></use>
                      </svg>
                    Title
                  </span>
                </button>
        </div>
            <div
              id="tab1-123-content"
              class="qld__tab-content active"
              data-tab="tab1-123"
              role="tabpanel"
              aria-labelledby="tab1-123-button"
              tabindex="0"
              aria-hidden="false"
            >
              Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
            </div>
              <div
                id="tab2-123-content"
                class="qld__tab-content"
                data-tab="tab2-123"
                role="tabpanel"
                aria-labelledby="tab2-123-button"
                tabindex="0"
              >
                Content
              </div>
              <div
                id="tab3-123-content"
                class="qld__tab-content"
                data-tab="tab3-123"
                role="tabpanel"
                aria-labelledby="tab3-123-button"
                tabindex="0"
              >
                Content
              </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

Component Attributes

NameFriendly NameDefault
themeTheme
displayTab Display
intro_widthIntro width
intro_headingIntro heading
intro_heading_levelIntro heading level
intro_bodyIntro body
typeTab Type
tab_numNumber of tabs
title_1Tab 1 - Title
icon_1Tab 1 - Icon
content_1Tab 1 - Content
title_2Tab 2 - Title
icon_2Tab 2 - Icon
content_2Tab 2 - Content
title_3Tab 3 - Title
icon_3Tab 3 - Icon
content_3Tab 3 - Content
title_4Tab 4 - Title
icon_4Tab 4 - Icon
content_4Tab 4 - Content
title_5Tab 5 - Title
icon_5Tab 5 - Icon
content_5Tab 5 - Content
title_6Tab 6 - Title
icon_6Tab 6 - Icon
content_6Tab 6 - Content
title_7Tab 7 - Title
icon_7Tab 7 - Icon
content_7Tab 7 - Content
title_8Tab 8 - Title
icon_8Tab 8 - Icon
content_8Tab 8 - Content
title_9Tab 9 - Title
icon_9Tab 9 - Icon
content_9Tab 9 - Content
title_10Tab 10 - Title
icon_10Tab 10 - Icon
content_10Tab 10 - Content
asset_selectAsset
id_fieldId field

Last updated:   January 2021
